title: Delete Calendar Event when Removing Assignee
excerpt: We are using a Google Calendar Integration, and I am able to create a calendar event when I assign a person to a task. However, I need to be able to delete the event from Google Calendar if I remove the assignee. In the …

posts.author: ScotACS (Scot Bishop)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are using a Google Calendar Integration, and I am able to create a calendar event when I assign a person to a task. However, I need to be able to delete the event from Google Calendar if I remove the assignee. In the same way, if an assignee is switched to someone else, I need the calendar event to also switch in Google Calendar.

Thoughts on how I can make this work? Seems without this functionality the Google Calendar integration is only half-baked…

posts.author: Jo.learning (Jo Flintham)
posts.cookedHtml: did you ever get an answer? I amhacing the same issues.

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Jo.learning , we created this app “Google Calendar Sync” to fix all the issues with monday’s integration - Google Calendar Sync - monday.com Marketplace

It is one of the most widely downloaded app, and is also Editor’s Choice app. This has automation rules for deleting event from calendar based on status change and also has ability to change invitees from your board itself.
